description: Local-only Ralph backlog to verify every cron, job, worker, script, and production table before any VPS deployment. No VPS changes are allowed in this phase.

userStories.title: Inventory local runtime surface
userStories.description: Enumerate all local Compose services, cron services, systemd units, workers, scripts, migrations, and database tables that must be verified.
acceptanceCriteria: Inventory lists every Docker Compose service and profiled cron service
Inventory lists every systemd unit template/timer under infra/deploy/systemd
Inventory lists worker entrypoints and scripts that affect ingestion or operations
Inventory lists all local database tables and row counts
Inventory records evidence commands and outputs

userStories.title: Verify local database tables contain real data
userStories.description: Check every production table in the local database for row counts, provenance columns, seed/mock placeholders, RLS, and real official-source data where the table is expected to be populated.
acceptanceCriteria: Every table has a row-count classification: populated, allowed-empty, or blocker
Compliance-critical tables have official source/provenance fields populated
No mock/sample/placeholder data is present in populated compliance tables
All unexpected empty tables are either filled with real data locally or logged as blockers
SQL evidence is stored in the progress log

userStories.title: Verify every worker and cron job locally
userStories.description: Run every continuous worker or cron-equivalent local run-once job against the local stack, verify exit status, sync_log outcome, and real official upstream usage.
acceptanceCriteria: Every worker has a local happy-path run or a documented blocker
Every cron service has a local run-once command and log evidence
Each successful run writes sync_log or equivalent operational evidence
Retries/dead-letter behavior is exercised where available
No worker serves or writes mock regulatory data

userStories.title: Verify local scripts and operational tooling
userStories.description: Run or statically verify every operational script, deployment script, maintenance script, SQL integrity script, and Ralph wrapper that can affect production readiness.
acceptanceCriteria: Every script has syntax/help/dry-run execution evidence or a blocker
Destructive scripts are not executed without explicit safe dry-run mode
Scripts that require env vars fail closed with actionable errors
Maintenance scripts run read-only by default where compliance data is involved

userStories.title: Verify MCP/API response accuracy locally
userStories.description: Run deterministic local API/MCP checks for current legal/tax facts, stale-data behavior, source freshness, audit logging, and malformed inputs.
acceptanceCriteria: LIVA article 90 returns current 21% text with BOE provenance
Source freshness endpoint returns non-empty official source families
Malformed/ambiguous requests fail safely
Tool or endpoint invocations are audit logged with traceability
No stale data is served silently in tested paths

userStories.title: Package final local deployment gate
userStories.description: Create a single local verification command/report that must pass before any VPS deployment to 212.227.227.64.
acceptanceCriteria: A repeatable local gate command exists
The gate covers database, workers, cron, scripts, MCP/API, and freshness checks
The gate fails non-zero on blockers
Final report states exactly what is ready and what remains blocked
